panels.title: Disk Used Vs Free On Root
Visitors Overview
panels.description: Compact visitor view. Use the drilldown row below to inspect devices behind one IP and IP history for one browser/device.

targets.expr: count(sum by (ip) (count_over_time({job="docker",service="backend"} |= "\"event\": \"site.visit\"" | json | ip != "" | label_format ip="{{.ip}}" [$__range])))

count(sum by (visitor_alias) (count_over_time({job="docker",service="backend"} |= "\"event\": \"site.visit\"" | json | visitor_alias != "" | label_format visitor_alias="{{.visitor_alias}}" [$__range])))
sum by (ip) (count_over_time({job="docker",service="backend"} |= "\"event\": \"site.visit\"" | json | ip != "" | label_format ip="{{.ip}}" [$__range]))

panels.title: IP Summary
panels.description: Unique public IPs seen on the site during the selected range. Open the drilldown row below to inspect device breakdown for one IP.

targets.expr: sum by (visitor_alias, device_label, device_class, browser_family, os_family) (count_over_time({job="docker",service="backend"} |= "\"event\": \"site.visit\"" | json | visitor_alias != "" | label_format visitor_alias="{{.visitor_alias}}", device_label="{{.device_label}}", device_class="{{.device_class}}", browser_family="{{.browser_family}}", os_family="{{.os_family}}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Device Summary
panels.description: Stable browser/device visitors derived from a per-browser visitor id. Use the drilldown row below to inspect the IP history for one device.

panels.title: Visitor Drilldown
panels.description: Detailed breakdowns for IP to device and device to IP relations. These panels are the expanded view for the compact visitor summary above.

targets.expr: sum by (ip, device_label, device_class, browser_family, os_family) (count_over_time({job="docker",service="backend"} |= "\"event\": \"site.visit\"" | json | ip != "" | label_format ip="{{.ip}}", device_label="{{.device_label}}", device_class="{{.device_class}}", browser_family="{{.browser_family}}", os_family="{{.os_family}}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Devices by IP
panels.description: Shows which device profiles were seen behind each IP and how many visit events they produced.

targets.expr: sum by (visitor_alias, device_label, ip) (count_over_time({job="docker",service="backend"} |= "\"event\": \"site.visit\"" | json | visitor_alias != "" | ip != "" | label_format visitor_alias="{{.visitor_alias}}", device_label="{{.device_label}}", ip="{{.ip}}" [$__range]))

panels.title: IPs by Device
panels.description: Shows from which IPs one browser/device visitor appeared during the selected range.

panels.title: Recent Visitor Events
panels.description: Raw site.visit telemetry events from the backend audit stream.
